title: "depTerminal()"
description: "Terminal metadata for one dep: false = none, true = COMPLETE, otherwise ERROR payload."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Terminal metadata for one dep: false = none, true = COMPLETE, otherwise ERROR payload.

## Import

```ts
import { depTerminal } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Signature

```ts
function depTerminal(
	ctx: Ctx,
	depIndex: number,
): unknown
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ctx` | `Ctx` | Node execution context supplied by the dispatcher. |
| `depIndex` | `number` | dep index value used by the helper. |

## Returns

The dep terminal result.

## Example

```ts
import { depTerminal } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/ctx/types.ts`
